function_v0.doc: Voluntarily step down from a role (sociocratic role release)\nFor governors: transfers to successor if designated, otherwise disables trust\nFor verifiers/oracles: returns full stake (no slashing for voluntary release)

function_v0.doc: Get verifier data

function_v0.doc:
Migrate data from an old contract after an upgrade.

During Soroban contract upgrades, instance storage is cleared while
persistent storage survives. This function restores instance storage
from the old contract and validates that persistent data is intact.

# Arguments
* `admin` - The admin address (must match the source contract's admin)
* `source_contract` - Address of the old contract to migrate from
* `expected_protocol_version` - Expected version of the source contract

# Returns
* `MigrationResult` - Details about the migration including validation counts

# Panics
* If caller is not the admin
* If migration was already completed
* If source protocol version doesn't match expected
function_v0.name: migrate_data

function_v0.doc: Get the total supply
function_v0.name: total_supply

function_v0.doc: Set probation period for an address
function_v0.name: set_probation

function_v0.doc: Get list of all registered trust IDs
function_v0.name: get_all_trusts

function_v0.doc: Get reputation score for a role (public)
function_v0.name: get_reputation

function_v0.doc: Get information about a specific trust
function_v0.name: get_trust_info

function_v0.doc: Get work claim details
function_v0.name: get_work_claim

function_v0.doc:
Register a new community trust
Parameters:
- governor: Address that will govern this trust
- name: Human-readable name for the trust
- annual_rate_bps: Annual demurrage rate in basis points (500-1500 = 5-15%)
- demurrage_period_days: How often to apply demurrage (default: 28 days)
function_v0.name: register_trust

function_v0.doc: Create a governance proposal\nProposer must be a trust governor for trust-specific proposals\nor admin for protocol-level proposals
function_v0.name: create_proposal

function_v0.doc: Check if address is in probation for a role (public)
function_v0.name: is_on_probation

function_v0.doc: Register as a grace period oracle\nOracles can activate grace periods for accounts in hardship
function_v0.name: register_oracle

function_v0.doc: Swap tokens from source trust to destination trust\nUses rate-adjusted calculation to account for different demurrage rates
function_v0.name: cross_trust_swap

function_v0.doc: Get grace period details for an account
function_v0.name: get_grace_period

function_v0.doc: Process a proposal and update its status\nTransitions from Review to Voting, or Voting to Approved/Rejected
function_v0.name: process_proposal

function_v0.doc: Vote on a governance proposal\nOnly trust members can vote on trust-specific proposals\nAdmin can vote on protocol proposals
function_v0.name: vote_on_proposal

function_v0.doc: Get the trust ID for an account
function_v0.name: get_account_trust

function_v0.doc: Get all proposals
function_v0.name: get_all_proposals

function_v0.doc: Get the next claim ID
function_v0.name: get_next_claim_id

function_v0.doc: Register as a verifier for a trust\nMust stake 100 KCHNG to become a verifier
function_v0.name: register_verifier

function_v0.doc: Reject a work claim (verifier only)
function_v0.name: reject_work_claim

function_v0.doc: Submit a work claim for verification\nReturns the claim ID
function_v0.name: submit_work_claim

function_v0.doc: Unregister as an oracle and return stake\nIf reputation is below 100 (removal threshold), 50% of stake is slashed\nIf reputation is below 200 (restricted), 25% of stake is slashed
function_v0.name: unregister_oracle

function_v0.doc:
Update a role-based score for a verifier

Role-based reputation allows for context-specific scoring.
Hierarchy: Domain \xe2\x86\x92 Aspect \xe2\x86\x92 Role

For example:
- Domain: Hospitality
- Aspect: Dining
- Role: Guest (score: 850)
- Role: Host (score: 400)

This allows someone to have high reputation as a dinner guest
but low reputation as a dinner host.

# Arguments
* `verifier` - The verifier whose role score is being updated
* `role_key` - Compound key "aspect:role" (e.g., "dining:guest", "ride_sharing:driver")
* `delta` - The change to apply (positive or negative, e.g., +30, -50)
* `scorer` - The account submitting this score update (must authenticate)

# Behavior
- If role doesn't exist, initializes to 500 (neutral) then applies delta
- Caps final score at [0, 1000]
- Requires auth from scorer
function_v0.name: update_role_score

function_v0.doc: Approve a work claim (verifier only)
function_v0.name: approve_work_claim

function_v0.doc: Implement an approved proposal\nCan only be called after implementation date has passed
function_v0.name: implement_proposal

function_v0.doc: Check if an account is currently in a grace period
function_v0.name: is_in_grace_period

function_v0.doc:
Report grace period abuse
Called by an oracle when a member violates grace period conditions
(e.g., claims illness but is seen working elsewhere)
Penalizes the abuser and ends their grace period early
function_v0.name: report_grace_abuse

function_v0.doc: Designate a successor for the governor role (sociocratic succession)\nOnly the current governor can call this\nThe successor must be a member of the trust
function_v0.name: designate_successor

function_v0.doc: Extend an existing grace period (requires community voting)
function_v0.name: extend_grace_period

function_v0.doc: Get all reputation scores for an address
function_v0.name: get_all_reputations

function_v0.doc: Get full reputation data for a role (public)
function_v0.name: get_reputation_data

function_v0.doc: Unregister as a verifier and return stake\nIf reputation is below 200, 10% of stake is slashed
function_v0.name: unregister_verifier

function_v0.name: get_migration_status

function_v0.doc: Get the next proposal ID
function_v0.name: get_next_proposal_id

function_v0.doc: Get the protocol version
function_v0.name: get_protocol_version

function_v0.doc: Get the total supply (raw U256)
function_v0.name: get_total_supply_raw

function_v0.doc:
Activate a grace period for an account
Parameters:
- oracle: Address of the oracle activating the grace period
- account: Account to activate grace period for
- grace_type: Type of grace period
- duration_days: Length of grace period
function_v0.name: activate_grace_period

function_v0.doc: Check if verifier can verify in multiple trusts (high reputation)
function_v0.name: can_multi_trust_verify

function_v0.doc:
Calculate exchange rate between two trusts
Returns the multiplier for converting from source to destination trust
Formula: (1 - r_source) / (1 - r_dest)
Example: Trust A (12%) \xe2\x86\x92 Trust B (8%) = (1 - 0.12) / (1 - 0.08) = 0.957
function_v0.name: calculate_exchange_rate

function_v0.doc: Simulate a cross-trust swap without executing it\nReturns the amount that would be received in the destination trust
function_v0.name: simulate_cross_trust_swap

function_v0.doc: Get the effective demurrage rate for an account
function_v0.name: get_account_demurrage_rate

function_v0.doc: Get pending claims for a verifier
function_v0.name: get_verifier_pending_claims
